hypothesis: Within a bounded declared US-equity universe, symbols with more provider-updated news observations in the latest five minutes warrant earlier downstream technical validation than peers with fewer recent observations; this discovery baseline makes no directional return claim.
falsification_rule: Reject the hypothesis if preregistered shadow trials show no positive lift in downstream setup-confirmation rate versus same-universe zero-news controls after at least 20 sessions and 100 independent observations, or if any coverage or point-in-time causality defect is found.
